era_context: Middle Bronze Age; 12th Dynasty Egypt under Amenemhat III. Old Babylonian Mesopotamia. Hittite Old Kingdom in Anatolia. Mature Harappan civilization in the Indus Valley. Early Shang dynasty in China (traditional dating).
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified for events listed.
historiographic_note: 1874 BCE is not marked by any known specific event in the surviving historical record. This year, like 1872–1873 BCE, falls within the reign of Amenemhat III but is not documented in contemporary or later sources as a year of particular significance. The historical record for the Bronze Age does not support year-by-year granularity for most regions and periods.
